task: Add a bilingual asset-tagging feature: a Prisma migration for the new tags table (db), a POST /assets/:id/tags endpoint that validates against a shared Zod schema (api), and a tag-editor panel on the catalogue page (ui).
expectedProperties: The assistant does not implement the feature inline — no product-source files under apps/ or packages/ are created or modified in this turn
A new Backlog item is added to tasks.md in the canonical format, with a scope: line listing multiple layers (e.g. db, api, ui)
The tasks.md item's acceptance criteria mention the migration, the endpoint, and the tag-editor panel
The assistant invokes (or states it is invoking) the feature-orchestrator agent on the new backlog item rather than dispatching layer work itself
The assistant's response references tasks.md and the orchestrator, not a plan to hand-write the layers itself
